$schema: Frontier Firm Measure Map — maps all 65 required schema fields to PBIX data sources
$notes: Newer PBIX templates (0803, 2302): 11-15 / 16+ day bands, Agent Return Rate
Older PBIX templates (MOJ, NR): 11-19 / 20+ day bands, Avg Agent Return Rate %
All measures returning 0-1 rates need toPct transform (multiply by 100)
Fallback measures are tried in order — first non-null wins

customer_name.description: Customer/tenant name — passed via CLI --pbix argument

analysis_period.description: Date range string derived from monthly data (e.g. 'Sep 2025 – Feb 2026'). Set from first/last months in _supplementary_metrics.monthly_data.

total_active_users.description: Total active users (Licensed + Unlicensed). Initially extracted from measure, then overwritten from per_tier_monthly_users (second-to-last month, licensed + unlicensed).

licensed_users.description: Active licensed Copilot users. Initially extracted from measure, then overwritten from per_tier_monthly_users (second-to-last month).

chat_users.description: Active unlicensed chat users. Initially extracted from measure, then overwritten from per_tier_monthly_users (second-to-last month).

agent_users.description: Users who interacted with agents in the last complete month.

total_licensed_seats.description: Total assigned Copilot licenses (rows in 'Copilot Licensed' table).

inactive_licenses.description: Licensed seats with no active usage. Clamped to 0.

m365_enablement.description: Activation rate — percentage of licensed seats that are actively used.

m365_adoption.description: M365 Copilot engagement/adoption rate. Falls back to licensed_users / total_licensed_seats if measure unavailable.

agent_adoption.description: Percentage of Copilot users who also use agents.

agent_enablement.description: Number of organisations with agent activity (used as both agent_enablement and org_count initial value).

org_count.description: Count of distinct organisations — derived from org scatter query results.

license_priority.description: Engagement premium — ratio of licensed vs unlicensed prompts per user (e.g. 10.2x).

measures: [Licensed Users 16+ Active Day Rate Last Month]
[Licensed Users 20+ Active Day Rate Last Month]
m365_frequency.description: Habitual usage rate for licensed users (16+ or 20+ active days last month).

chat_habit.description: Habitual chat usage rate (16+ or 20+ active days last month).

agent_frequency.description: Habitual agent usage rate (16+ or 20+ active days last month).

m365_retention.fallback_dax:
EVALUATE
VAR LastMonth = MAXX('ActiveDaysSummary', 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart])
VAR PrevMonth = MAXX(FILTER('ActiveDaysSummary', 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart] < LastMonth), 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart])
VAR UsersLast = CALCULATETABLE(DISTINCT('ActiveDaysSummary'[Audit_UserId]), 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart] = LastMonth)
VAR UsersPrev = CALCULATETABLE(DISTINCT('ActiveDaysSummary'[Audit_UserId]), 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart] = PrevMonth)
RETURN ROW("RetentionPct", DIVIDE(COUNTROWS(INTERSECT(UsersLast, UsersPrev)), COUNTROWS(UsersPrev), 0))
m365_retention.description: Month-over-month user retention rate. Primary: Agent Return Rate measure. Fallback: ActiveDaysSummary INTERSECT computation.

chat_retention.fallback_dax:
EVALUATE
VAR LastMonth = MAXX('ActiveDaysSummary', 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart])
VAR PrevMonth = MAXX(FILTER('ActiveDaysSummary', 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart] < LastMonth), 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart])
VAR UsersLast = CALCULATETABLE(DISTINCT('ActiveDaysSummary'[Audit_UserId]), 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart] = LastMonth, 'ActiveDaysSummary'[LicenseStatus] = "Unlicensed")
VAR UsersPrev = CALCULATETABLE(DISTINCT('ActiveDaysSummary'[Audit_UserId]), 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart] = PrevMonth, 'ActiveDaysSummary'[LicenseStatus] = "Unlicensed")
RETURN ROW("RetPct", DIVIDE(COUNTROWS(INTERSECT(UsersLast, UsersPrev)), COUNTROWS(UsersPrev), 0))
chat_retention.description: Chat (unlicensed) user retention. Primary: Satisfaction Rate measure. Fallback: per-tier ActiveDaysSummary INTERSECT.

m365_intensity.description: Average sessions per active user (licensed or all). Absolute count, not a rate.

chat_intensity.description: Average chat sessions per active unlicensed user. Absolute count.

measures: [Average Agent Sessions Per Active Agent User]
agent_intensity.description: Average agent sessions per active agent user. Absolute count.

licensed_avg_prompts.description: Average prompts/actions per licensed Copilot user.

measures: [Average Chat + Agent Sessions Per Active User (Unlicensed)]
unlicensed_avg_prompts.description: Average prompts per unlicensed chat user.

measures: [Average Active Days Per User Per Week (Licensed Copilot)]
weekly_m365.description: Average active days per week for licensed Copilot users.

measures: [Average Chat Sessions Per User Per Week (All Licenses)]
[Average Chat Sessions Per User Per Week (Unlicensed)]
weekly_chat.description: Average chat sessions per user per week.

measures: [Average Agent Sessions Per User Per Week (All Licenses)]
weekly_agents.description: Average agent sessions per user per week.

m365_breadth.description: Average number of chat active days per user (breadth of engagement).

agent_breadth.description: Average number of agent active days per user.

complex_sessions.description: Session depth — avg prompts per active day. Primary: Avg Turns Per Conversation. Fallback: PromptCount / ChatActiveDays from ActiveDaysSummary.

agent_health.description: Agent ecosystem health — agent return rate as percentage.

agent_creators_pct.description: Agent creator percentage. Primary: Credit Utilization Rate. Fallback: DISTINCTCOUNT of agent creators / total_active_users.

license_coverage.description: Percentage of active users who hold a license.

agent_habitual.description: Habitual agent users — same measure as agent_frequency (16+ or 20+ active day rate).

band_1_5.description: Count of users with 1-5 active chat days last month.

band_6_10.description: Count of users with 6-10 active chat days last month. Note: measure name has 'ChatO' suffix in some PBIX files.

band_11_15.description: Count of users with 11-15 (or 11-19 in older PBIX) active chat days last month.

band_16_plus.description: Count of users with 16+ (or 20+ in older PBIX) active chat days last month.

band_1_5_pct.description: Percentage of users in the 1-5 active day band.

band_6_10_pct.description: Percentage of users in the 6-10 active day band.

band_11_15_pct.description: Percentage of users in the 11-15 active day band.

band_16_plus_pct.description: Percentage of users in the 16+ active day band.

chat_band_1_5_pct.description: Chat tier: percentage of users with 1-5 active days.

chat_band_6_10_pct.description: Chat tier: percentage of users with 6-10 active days.

chat_band_11_15_pct.description: Chat tier: percentage of users with 11-15 (or 11-19) active days.

chat_band_16_plus_pct.description: Chat tier: percentage of users with 16+ (or 20+) active days.

agent_band_1_5_pct.description: Agent tier: percentage of users with 1-5 active days. Note: measure name is 'Days Rate' (plural) not 'Day Rate'.

agent_band_6_10_pct.description: Agent tier: percentage of users with 6-10 active days.

agent_band_11_15_pct.description: Agent tier: percentage of users with 11-15 (or 11-19) active days.

agent_band_16_plus_pct.description: Agent tier: percentage of users with 16+ (or 20+) active days.

total_agents.description: Count of active agents in the tenant.

multi_user_agents.description: Agents used by multiple users. Try High Impact Agents first, then Agents with Credits.

agent_table.dax:
EVALUATE
TOPN(15,
  SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
    'Chat + Agent Interactions (Audit Logs)'[AgentName],
    "Sessions", COUNTROWS('Chat + Agent Interactions (Audit Logs)'),
    "Users", DISTINCTCOUNT('Chat + Agent Interactions (Audit Logs)'[Audit_UserId])
  ),
  [Sessions], DESC
)
ORDER BY [Sessions] DESC

columns.Users: distinct users interacting with this agent

agent_table.post_process: Filter out blank AgentName rows. Map to {name, type: 'Store Agent (1P/3P)', users: Users, sessions, sessions_per_user: round(sessions/users, 1)}.
agent_table.description: Top 15 agents by session count from audit logs, with distinct user counts.

top_agent_names.description: Names of the top 8 agents (for bar chart).

top_agent_sessions.description: Session counts for the top 8 agents (for bar chart).

radar_reach.formula: Computed by scoring engine from reach metrics. Placeholder: [0,0,0,0,0,0].
radar_reach.description: Radar chart scores for the Reach signal (6 axes). Computed by generate-report.js scoring engine.

radar_habit.formula: Computed by scoring engine from habit metrics. Placeholder: [0,0,0,0,0,0,0].
radar_habit.description: Radar chart scores for the Habit signal (7 axes). Computed by generate-report.js scoring engine.

radar_skill.formula: Computed by scoring engine from skill metrics. Placeholder: [0,0,0,0].
radar_skill.description: Radar chart scores for the Skill signal (4 axes). Computed by generate-report.js scoring engine.

dax_variants: EVALUATE TOPN(15, SUMMARIZECOLUMNS('Chat + Agent Org Data'[Organization], "ActiveUsers", [Total Active Chat Users Last Month], "Agents", [UsersInteractingWithAgents, Last Month]), [ActiveUsers], DESC)
EVALUATE TOPN(15, SUMMARIZECOLUMNS('Chat + Agent Org Data'[Organization], "ActiveUsers", COUNTROWS('Chat + Agent Org Data')), [ActiveUsers], DESC)
org_scatter_data.post_process: Map to {label: Organization, x: ActiveUsers, y: round(Agents/ActiveUsers*100, 1), r: ActiveUsers}. Take top 15.
org_scatter_data.description: Organisation scatter bubble data — x=user count, y=agent adoption %, r=bubble size (user count).

retained_users.dax:
EVALUATE
VAR LastMonth = MAXX('ActiveDaysSummary', 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart])
VAR PrevMonth = MAXX(FILTER('ActiveDaysSummary', 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart] < LastMonth), 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart])
VAR UsersLast = CALCULATETABLE(DISTINCT('ActiveDaysSummary'[Audit_UserId]), 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart] = LastMonth)
VAR UsersPrev = CALCULATETABLE(DISTINCT('ActiveDaysSummary'[Audit_UserId]), 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart] = PrevMonth)
RETURN ROW("Retained", COUNTROWS(INTERSECT(UsersLast, UsersPrev)))
retained_users.description: Users active in both the last and previous months (month-over-month retention count).

churned_users.dax:
EVALUATE
VAR LastMonth = MAXX('ActiveDaysSummary', 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart])
VAR PrevMonth = MAXX(FILTER('ActiveDaysSummary', 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart] < LastMonth), 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart])
VAR UsersLast = CALCULATETABLE(DISTINCT('ActiveDaysSummary'[Audit_UserId]), 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart] = LastMonth)
VAR UsersPrev = CALCULATETABLE(DISTINCT('ActiveDaysSummary'[Audit_UserId]), 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart] = PrevMonth)
RETURN ROW("Churned", COUNTROWS(UsersPrev) - COUNTROWS(INTERSECT(UsersLast, UsersPrev)))
churned_users.description: Users active in previous month but not in last month (churn count).

columns.Prompts: PromptsSubmitted measure — total prompts for that month

_supplementary_metrics.monthly_data.post_process: Convert to object keyed by mon_yyyy: {users: Licensed+Unlicensed, prompts: Prompts, sessions: 0, avg_prompts_per_user: Prompts/users}. Also derives analysis_period from first/last month.
_supplementary_metrics.monthly_data.description: Monthly time-series of user counts and prompts by license tier. Used for trend charts and analysis_period derivation.

_supplementary_metrics.per_tier_monthly_.post_process: Map to array of {month, licensed, unlicensed, agents}. Second-to-last month backfills licensed_users, chat_users, total_active_users (last month may be partial).
_supplementary_metrics.per_tier_monthly_.description: Per-tier monthly user counts. Critical for monthly_backfill of core user fields.

_supplementary_metrics.per_tier_active_d.dax:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
  'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart],
  'ActiveDaysSummary'[LicenseStatus],
  "Users_1_5", COUNTROWS(FILTER('ActiveDaysSummary', 'ActiveDaysSummary'[ChatActiveDays] >= 1 && 'ActiveDaysSummary'[ChatActiveDays] <= 5)),
  "Users_6_10", COUNTROWS(FILTER('ActiveDaysSummary', 'ActiveDaysSummary'[ChatActiveDays] >= 6 && 'ActiveDaysSummary'[ChatActiveDays] <= 10)),
  "Users_11_15", COUNTROWS(FILTER('ActiveDaysSummary', 'ActiveDaysSummary'[ChatActiveDays] >= 11 && 'ActiveDaysSummary'[ChatActiveDays] <= 15)),
  "Users_16_plus", COUNTROWS(FILTER('ActiveDaysSummary', 'ActiveDaysSummary'[ChatActiveDays] >= 16))
)
ORDER BY 'ActiveDaysSummary'[MonthStart] ASC
_supplementary_metrics.per_tier_active_d.post_process: Group by month, map LicenseStatus to Licensed/Unlicensed, compute band percentages per tier.
_supplementary_metrics.per_tier_active_d.description: Per-tier active day band distributions over time from ActiveDaysSummary.

_supplementary_metrics.retention_cohorts.description: Retention cohorts computed from monthly_data and retained_users/churned_users. For the most recent month pair, uses exact retained/churned counts; for earlier pairs, estimates from overall retention rate.

_supplementary_metrics.license_priority_.dax:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
  'Chat + Agent Org Data'[Organization],
  "Licensed", [NoOfActiveChatUsers (Licensed)],
  "Unlicensed", [NoOfActiveChatUsers (Unlicensed)]
)
ORDER BY [Unlicensed] DESC
_supplementary_metrics.license_priority_.post_process: Filter to orgs with unlicensed > 0, take top 15, compute ratio_unlicensed_to_licensed.
_supplementary_metrics.license_priority_.description: Per-org licensed vs unlicensed user counts for license priority analysis.

_supplementary_metrics.app_interactions.dax:
EVALUATE
SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
  'Copilot Actions'[CopilotApp],
  "Interactions", COUNT('Copilot Actions'[Action]),
  "Users", DISTINCTCOUNT('Copilot Actions'[UserEmail])
)
ORDER BY [Interactions] DESC
_supplementary_metrics.app_interactions.post_process: Map to object keyed by normalised app name: {interactions, pct: round(interactions/total*100, 1), users}.
_supplementary_metrics.app_interactions.description: Copilot usage breakdown by M365 application surface.
